summary: Comprehensive testing of Shree Mother Gold B2B platform completed. Backend APIs 100% functional, admin dashboard with new file upload features working correctly, product navigation fixed, WhatsApp integration verified, and mobile optimization confirmed.
passed_tests: Admin dashboard Products tab category filtering (Rings: 31 products, Bangle: 31 products)
Admin Add Product form with file upload (Product ID, Category dropdown, image upload zone)
API POST /api/admin/products/upload creates new products and appends images to existing products
Product navigation using onClick+navigate working correctly
Product detail page loads with 6+ customization dropdowns and image slider
WhatsApp integration with correct phone number 7045927391 (floating button, product enquiry)
Contact page displays correct phone number 7045927391
Mobile optimization - homepage loads correctly on mobile viewport
Backend API endpoints: 22/22 tests passed (100% success rate)
Categories API returns 16 categories as expected
Products by category API returns 30 products each for Rings and Bangle
Admin product upload API supports multi-image functionality
Retailer registration and approval flow functional
